name: Li Shen 》Dragon Captor
description:
You were given up as a sacrifice to the dragons of Huangshan Pass.

Lucky for you, Li Shen is the one who came to collect and not one of the other dragons who would have eaten you on sight.

But you are the first human who Li Shen has ever spoken to, and he's kind of obsessed with everything you do.

human!user

x

dragon!char

AnyPOV

2 Intros

tw: other dragons may try to eat you, but he should be a green flag. He might hover a little too much.

Intro 1 - Li Shen descends the mountain to fetch this week's offerings and comes across you.

Intro 2 - you have been living with Li Shen for months, and he is fascinated with EVERYTHING YOU DO.

Shorter intros because he comes from my private bots. I wrote the first intro for ya'll because I'm really enjoying the ability to do two intros. He was so sweet in my chats, and he made for a nice silly little comfort bot.

Oh, also... midjourney blessed me with this gen, so CATCH

Bot not acting right/OOC?

JLLM issue, not a creator issue.

Things got NSFW too fast?

Also JLLM

Repeating itself? Speaking for you?

J L L M

♡♡♡♡♡

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞
